name: Suspicious Script Interpreter Spawned by Office
description: Detects Office applications spawning script interpreters - potential macro malware
query:
// Office Application Spawning Scripts
// Word/Excel/PowerPoint launching PowerShell, CMD, WScript
events from endpoint
where parent_process_name in ("winword.exe", "excel.exe", "powerpnt.exe", "outlook.exe")
  and process_name in ("powershell.exe", "cmd.exe", "wscript.exe", "cscript.exe", "mshta.exe")
group by hostname, username, parent_process_name
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
